ROAM
Journeys Stays Hosts About Stories Plan a trip ↗
Plan a trip ↗

People before places

Hosts who know
the quiet paths.

They aren’t performers. They’re locals who love their home enough to share it carefully — and leave room for you to find your own way through it.

Patagonia

Amara

Glaciologist turned trail host. Best at reading weather — and when to shut up and let the ridge do the talking.

Cyclades

Leo

Ferry schedules memorized. Swims before breakfast. Knows which taverna still cooks like someone’s grandmother is in the back.

Morocco

Imani

Speaks three languages and the language of spice markets. Builds nights that end around a fire, not a checklist.

Dolomites

Mateo

Alpine guide with a soft spot for meadow lunches and cabins without clocks. Says the mountain decides the itinerary.

Travel with people
who live there.

Plan a trip →
ROAM

Made for the beautifully curious.
